mapper.sql: A.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID , A.NLVL_BAS_SEQ , A.SCOMMENT , A.DCREATE_DT , A.SCREATE_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID

, B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , B.SSVC_GROUP_CD , B.SSVC_OBJ_CD , B.NMAX_SEQ , B.SLVL_BAS_LEVEL_CD , C.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , D.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , E.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM , F.SORG_NM AS SPOS_DEPT_ORG_NM ,(SELECT STRING_AGG(SORG_NM,'-') FROM (SELECT SORG_NM FROM MST.TB_ORG_BAS AS G START WITH G.SKT_ORG_ID = A.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID CONNECT BY G.SKT_ORG_ID = PRIOR G.SUP_KT_ORG_ID ORDER BY G.SORG_PREF_ODRG) ) AS SPOS_DEPT_ORG_FULL_NM
, A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.SSVC_GROUP_CD , A.SSVC_OBJ_CD , A.NMAX_SEQ , A.SLVL_BAS_LEVEL_CD , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , A.SSVC_GROUP_NM , A.SSVC_OBJ_NM , A.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_NM , A.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_FULL_NM
AND A.NLVL_BAS_SEQ = B.NLVL_BAS_SEQ AND A.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID = F.SKT_ORG_ID AND B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = C.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND B.SSVC_GROUP_CD = D.SLVL_CD (+) AND B.SSVC_OBJ_CD = E.SLVL_CD (+)
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM MST.TB_OPER_TEAM_AUTH_TXN A
ORDER BY F.SORG_NM , B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , D.SLVL_NM , E.SLVL_NM

SELECT
FROM MST.TB_OPER_TEAM_AUTH_TXN A
ORDER BY F.SORG_NM , B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , D.SLVL_NM , E.SLVL_NM

SELECT
count(1) totalCount FROM MST.TB_OPER_TEAM_AUTH_TXN A

SELECT DISTINCT B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , C.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM FROM MST.TB_OPER_TEAM_AUTH_TXN A ,MST.TB_LVL_BAS B ,MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD C ,MST.TB_LVL_CD D ,MST.TB_LVL_CD E WHERE 1=1 AND A.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID = #{sposDeptOrgId, jdbcType=CHAR} AND A.NLVL_BAS_SEQ = B.NLVL_BAS_SEQ AND B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = C.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AND B.SSVC_GROUP_CD = D.SLVL_CD AND B.SSVC_OBJ_CD = E.SLVL_CD ORDER BY B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD ASC
